occupation: Sales Manager at Alternative Media Group
headline: Sales Manager at PT.Alternative Media Group (AMG)
summary: Experienced Sales Manager with a demonstrated history of working in the marketing and advertising industry. Skilled in Sales, Media Relations, Management, Account Management, and Direct Sales. Strong sales professional with a Bachelor's degree focused in Marketing/Marketing Management, General from Universitas Bina Nusantara (Binus).
